narrative:
Brownhelm Township has 5,584 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.0%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.3 percentage points.
